creator: georg-bsd@schorsch-tech.de
text:
Created attachment 234871
net/samba416: Compiles

Compiles but pkg-plist.(python|ad_dc|cluster) not ok. I know too less about the single samba components to sort them out. I updated the man pages and the build dependencies. The regenerated man pages make this patch bigger than 1 MB so i attached it as a tar.gz.

I also disabled all patches from freebsd to make it compile. Also the vfs-freebsd! 

My goal was to setup a "base" from where to step forward.

Maybe someone with more experience what belongs where can sort the pkg-plists ....
